_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for OpenClaw crons. Regenerated from live. Restore via scripts/restore-crons.py if cron list goes empty.

payload.message: Good morning\! Did you weigh yourself today? If yes, reply with: weight: X.X (e.g. weight: 91.5)

Weekly review for Akash. Do ALL sections, then send ONE WhatsApp message (max 650 words). Skip any section with nothing to report; never fabricate.

1. HEALTH: Query the Health & Meds Notion database. Summarize supplements running low, upcoming appointments, medication reminders, and health notes from the past week.

2. COMPETITORS: Run `python3 /root/.openclaw/workspace/research/research.py "Revolut Monzo Starling Bunq news this week"` (Tavily). For each competitor with news: bold name, what happened (2 sentences), why it matters (1 sentence). Save each to Notion Competitor Tracker (database_id: 9a7e80a037544a2f929b295c37fa43f8). Skip competitors with no news.

3. BRAIN BRIEF: Query Second Brain (data_source_id: f1ce4e0f-9e0d-43da-87f8-94dae2732962) for this week's entries. Synthesize: top decisions (max 3), ideas (max 3), one thing to carry forward.

4. WIKI HEALTH: Query Personal Wiki DB (data_source_id: 33d78008-9100-8197-9f0f-000b205edfe8). Report domains with fewer than 3 Career/Framework pages and pages not reviewed in 30+ days. Suggest 3 specific wiki pages to add/update, grounded in Akash's work at CheQ, Flipkart Pay, or Trade Republic.

5. JOB SEARCH: Note any LinkedIn activity or job-search progress from the week.

6. WEEKLY USAGE: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh weekly` and add a one-line summary.

Morning digest for Akash. Keep context LEAN — summarize each tool result to a few lines immediately and do NOT retain raw article text or full JSON. Then send ONE WhatsApp message (max 700 words). Skip empty sections; never fabricate.

1. EMAIL: `himalaya envelope list -s 10 -f INBOX`. Report total unread, recruiter emails (job title + company), anything urgent today (max 4 lines). If auth fails, one line: "Email: unavailable - refresh Gmail app password".

2. NEWS: Run ONLY these two commands:
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "AI, fintech and European startup news today"
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "fintech product launches this week"
   Pick the 3 best stories. For EACH write bold headline + 2-sentence why-it-matters, then discard the raw text. Save the 3 to Notion News Inbox (database_id: 8a900cb78c0c4be996347c5dfebec375).

3. HEALTH: `/root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-daily-summary.sh`; parse JSON. Report yesterday nutrition totals + today_workout. If meal_count is 0 say "No meals logged yesterday".

4. CONTENT IDEAS: Query Notion Content Ideas (database_id: f008d0bb-ac81-401d-889d-4e8f508ab134). List up to 3 ideas whose Status is NOT Published/Done (oldest first), one line each. If none, skip. NOTE: this DB has no due-date property - do not look for one.

5. WIKI CANDIDATES: Query ONLY the Second Brain DB (data_source_id: e4027aafd2ff49e1babf7487725e2ef4) for rows added in the last 24h with wiki_candidate=true. List up to 3: one-line gist (<=120 chars) + URL. If none, skip. NOTE: Twitter Insights has no wiki_candidate field - do NOT query it.

6. FOOTER: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh daily`; append ONE line: yesterday usage + est cost (Hetzner EUR0.23 + MiniMax $0.33 + Anthropic est).

Sections: Email | News | Health | Ideas | Wiki | footer.

jobs.name: move-checklist-digest
jobs._note: Enable when ready. Sends daily move checklist digest. Set enabled=true after testing.

payload.message:
Move checklist daily digest for Akash (+ Abhigna for "Both" rows).

1. Run: node /root/lyra-ai/scripts/move-checklist-sync.mjs --digest
   Capture stdout.

2. Check the Move Checklist Notion DB (data_source_id: 687c4c41-e69f-4140-bdd5-7075d8b18d46).
   Find any rows where:
   - Status = Not started AND Target Date is overdue (interpret date text like "9th July", "Mid July" as July 2026)
   - Priority = High AND Status = Not started
   - Lyra = @lyra:remind AND Target Date is within 7 days
   List them.

3. Check if row 45 (Start Visa Process) is Done or In progress. If not, add a warning: VISA NOT STARTED.

4. Send ONE WhatsApp message with the digest. Max 600 words. Format:
   - Line 1: 🏠 Move digest [date]  
   - Progress bar: X/45 done
   - 🔴 Urgent (High priority, not started, due soon)
   - 🔒 Blocked (gate-blocked rows)
   - ✅ Done this week
   - Footer: Reply "done <N>", "snooze <N>", "draft <N>"

Route ONLY Abhigna's rows (Owner=Abhigna) and Both rows to BOTH of you. Akash-only rows go only to Akash.
Abhigna WhatsApp: +4917682162578. Route her rows AND Both rows to both Akash and Abhigna. Route Akash-only rows only to Akash.

7. SELL INVENTORY: Query Sell Inventory Notion DB (data_source_id: a2353576-fddc-4987-b2aa-c77d9ef1b86c). List items where Status="Not listed yet" with Hard Deadline within 6 weeks — needs listing urgently. List items where Status="Enquiries" — flag for follow-up. If any item Hard Deadline is within 2 weeks and Status is not Sold/Donated/Dispose, flag URGENT. Add a "📦 Sell pipeline" section only if there are items to surface.
